case_title: MING HUA SHI VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT OF ENTIRE CASE;(TRANSACTION ID # 59984654) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHI, MING HUA
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-23-2016 CONTINUED TO JAN-04-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHI, MING HUA AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO FOURTEEN STREET PARTNERSHIP, LLC DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-23-2016 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-22-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-31-2016

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-28-2017 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JAN-04-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100009434)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-28-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
